result.response_content_preview:
THOUGHT:
Since the current reference list is empty, I need to establish a foundational citation that directly addresses the core theme of the workshop paper: real-world systemic challenges, deployment pitfalls, and hidden failure modes in machine learning/deep learning systems. This citation will serve to summarize existing research on ML engineering challenges and highlight the research gap between controlled benchmark performance and real-world robustness. The seminal paper "Hidden Technical Debt in Machine Learning Systems" perfectly captures these systemic pitfalls and provides a strong theoretical foundation for discussing why deep learning models fail in production despite strong offline metrics. This covers citation reasons 1 (Summarizing Research) and 5 (Highlighting Research Gaps).

```json
